mapper.select: SELECT acnt_no, usr_no, balance FROM accounts_personal WHERE usr_no = #{usrNo} AND currency = 'KRW' AND ROWNUM = 1
SELECT acnt_no FROM foreign_accounts_personal WHERE usr_no = #{usrNo} AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT rate_no, cur_nm AS cur_cd, tts AS buy_rate, ttb AS sell_rate, deal_bas_r AS base_rate, ntc_dt FROM ( SELECT r.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY cur_nm ORDER BY ntc_dt DESC, rate_no DESC ) rn FROM exchange_rates r ) WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY cur_nm

SELECT rate_no, cur_nm AS cur_cd, tts AS buy_rate, ttb AS sell_rate, deal_bas_r AS base_rate, ntc_dt FROM ( SELECT r.* FROM exchange_rates r WHERE cur_nm = #{curCd} ORDER BY ntc_dt DESC, rate_no DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO balances (bal_no, acnt_no, currency, balance, upd_dt) VALUES (SEQ_BALANCES.NEXTVAL, #{acntId}, #{curCd}, #{balance}, SYSDATE)

INSERT INTO exchange_requests (exch_no, usr_type, from_acnt, to_acnt, from_cur, to_cur, from_amt, to_amt, apld_rate, exch_cplt_dt) VALUES (SEQ_EXCHANGE_REQUESTS.NEXTVAL, #{usrType}, #{fromAcnt}, #{toAcnt}, #{fromCur}, #{toCur}, #{fromAmt}, #{toAmt}, #{apldRate}, SYSDATE)
